home.title: komorebi
home.tagline: dappled light for a quiet mind
home.subtitle: A gentle companion that remembers your practice — learning what helps, and noticing when mindfulness might be adding weight rather than easing it.
watchItems: Treating practice as something to perform
Continuing when it's making things harder
doesNotItems: No streaks. No scores. No achievements.
No promises about how you'll feel.
home.llmInactive: AI guidance: off — add OPENAI_API_KEY to .env.local
home.ttsInactive: Voice: text only — add ELEVENLABS_API_KEY to .env.local
